description: A clean, modern FAQ section with expandable/collapsible accordion items in a white card on light gray background.

title.text: Let me know anything before you try

items.question: How much average of car prices that you sell?
items.answer: You can buy a Tesla for anywhere between $46,990 to $100,000. The Model 3 is the most affordable Tesla, followed by the Model Y.

items.question: When can I drive away in my new car after I pay it?
items.answer: You can drive away in your new car immediately after completing the payment and documentation process. We ensure a seamless handover experience with all necessary paperwork completed on the spot.

items.question: How many financing options do you offer?
items.answer: We offer multiple financing options including cash payment, bank transfer, credit card, and installment plans. We also partner with leading financial institutions to provide competitive loan options with flexible terms.

items.question: What happens if I don't have a down payment?
items.answer: We understand that not everyone has a down payment ready. We offer various options including zero-down payment plans, trade-in opportunities, and flexible payment arrangements to make car ownership accessible to everyone.
